display.purpose: Hero H1 and section H2 headlines only.

label.purpose: Uppercase section tags preceding headings; the system's signature pre-heading device.

shadows.name: premium
shadows.purpose: Hero imagery frame, the most elevated neutral surface.

shadows.name: card
shadows.purpose: Default neutral elevated panel (floating captions, call-outs).

shadows.name: crimson-ambient-hover
shadows.purpose: Product/brand card hover shadow (deepens, no color change).

shadows.name: button-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button resting shadow; the one shadow using flat crimson instead of the deep shadow tint.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for hover lifts, nav transitions, card scale.

motion.name: duration-hover
motion.purpose: Standard hover/transition duration for buttons, nav links, borders.

motion.name: duration-image
motion.purpose: Slower duration for image scale-on-hover (product cards).

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Highest-priority action per view, e.g. "ขอใบเสนอราคา" (request quote).
components.html: ขอใบเสนอราคา
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; background: #d71920; color: #ffffff; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(215,25,32,0.22); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #b91018; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 18px 42px rgba(215,25,32,0.24); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d71920; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Lower-commitment action beside a primary button, e.g. "ขอคำปรึกษา" (ask for advice).
components.html: ขอคำปรึกษา
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); color: #b91018; border: 1px solid #ffe1e1; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { border-color: #ffd6d6; background: #fff1f1; transform: translateY(-2px); box-shadow: 0 14px 34px rgba(103,16,18,0.08); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d71920; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary/browse action, e.g. "ดูหมวดสินค้า" (view categories).
components.html: ดูหมวดสินค้า
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-height: 48px; padding: 12px 20px; border-radius: 9999px; background: transparent; color: #171717; font-weight: 600; font-size: 14px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; transition: all 0.3s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); text-decoration: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f5f5f5; transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d71920; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Product category card with photo, name, short description, and a 'view category' link.
components.html:
ซองฟอยล์

ซองฟอยล์บรรจุภัณฑ์

วัสดุคุณภาพสูง ปรับขนาดได้ตามสินค้า

ดูข้อมูลหมวดนี้
components.css: .ds-product-card { overflow: hidden; border-radius: 1.25rem; border: 1px solid rgba(229,229,229,0.7); background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 14px 40px rgba(103,16,18,0.055); transition: all 0.5s cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1); font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; } .ds-product-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: #ffe1e1; box-shadow: 0 22px 62px rgba(103,16,18,0.10); } .ds-product-card__media { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 4/3; background: radial-gradient(circle at 50% 38%, #ffffff 0%, #fff7f7 58%, #f3eeee 100%); padding: 16px; } .ds-product-card__tag { position: absolute; left: 16px; top: 16px; border-radius: 9999px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.92); padding: 4px 12px; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 700; color: #b91018; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-product-card__body { padding: 20px 24px; } .ds-product-card__title { font-size: 18px; font-weight: 900; color: #171717; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-product-card__desc { margin-top: 12px; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.75; color: #525252; } .ds-product-card__link { margin-top: 20px; display: inline-flex; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; color: #b91018; transition: transform 0.3s; } .ds-product-card:hover .ds-product-card__link { transform: translateX(4px); }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Uppercase tag preceding a section heading or hero title — the system's signature pre-heading device.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.16em; color: #b91018; }

components.name: Navigation Pill Link
components.description: Desktop nav link; active state gets a tinted pill background, inactive gets a hover tint.
components.html: หน้าแรกเกี่ยวกับเราสินค้า
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-family: Kanit, sans-serif; } .ds-nav__link { border-radius: 9999px; padding: 8px 14px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #404040; text-decoration: none; transition: all 0.3s; } .ds-nav__link:hover { background: #ffffff; color: #b91018; } .ds-nav__link--active { background: #fff1f1; color: #b91018; box-shadow: 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,0.05); } .ds-nav__link:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #d71920; outline-offset: 2px; }

narrative.overview: Packtive Packaging sells production capability to other businesses, not a feeling — so the system reads as a showroom built on top of a real factory: confident, exact, and unmistakably capable, with just enough polish that a brand manager trusts it on sight. Every surface stays paper-white and lets product photography do the convincing; the single crimson accent is reserved for the moments that move a visitor toward a quote, never spent on decoration. This system explicitly rejects the cluttered, discount-print-shop look of budget packaging vendors and the over-decorated, gradient-heavy "AI generated" landing page aesthetic — no purple/cyan gradients, no glassmorphism, no glow-for-glow's-sake. It also rejects flatness for its own sake: depth exists, but only as a soft, crimson-tinted ambient glow that signals "this is the important thing," never as a hard drop shadow.
keyCharacteristics: Single accent color (factory crimson) spent sparingly and only on action/identity moments
Paper-white canvas; product photography is the hero, never competing with UI chrome
Heavy display weight (font-black, 900) headlines paired with generous, airy body line-height
Soft, color-tinted ambient shadows instead of neutral black drop shadows
Pill-shaped, tactile buttons with a confident hover-lift on every interactive surface

rules.name: The One Red Rule
rules.body: Factory Crimson (#d71920) is the only saturated color in the system. If a new screen needs a second "loud" color, that's a sign the page is doing too much — solve it with hierarchy (size, weight, white space), not a second hue.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: There is exactly one font family in this system. Never introduce a second typeface "for variety" — express hierarchy with the existing weight scale (300→900) and size, not a new font.

rules.name: The Tinted-Not-Black Rule
rules.body: Any shadow touching a brand surface (card, button, brand panel) is tinted with Factory Crimson Shadow (#671012) at low opacity, never neutral black. Generic content surfaces (hero image frame, floating caption) may use the neutral Premium/Card values instead.

dos: Do keep Factory Crimson (#d71920) as the only saturated color on any given screen — everything else is white, ink, or a crimson tint/shadow of that same hue.
Do use font-black (900) Kanit for every headline and font-normal (400) for body copy — weight contrast is the hierarchy system, not font changes.
Do tint shadows on brand surfaces with rgba(103,16,18, 0.05–0.10) instead of neutral black — see The Tinted-Not-Black Rule.
Do give every interactive element a hover lift (-translate-y-0.5 or greater) plus a deepened shadow, and always keep .focus-ring for keyboard accessibility.

Do let product photography fill the frame (object-contain/object-cover on a near-white backdrop) — imagery is the credibility signal, matching the napat-packaging.com reference's product-led approach.
donts: Don't introduce a second saturated accent color (no purple, cyan, or secondary brand hue) — this breaks The One Red Rule and immediately reads as generic SaaS/AI-template design, which PRODUCT.md explicitly calls out as an anti-reference.
Don't use hard, small-blur, neutral-gray shadows (the "2014 app" look) — if a shadow looks crisp instead of soft and glowing, the blur radius is too small and/or the opacity is too high.
Don't add a second font family "for variety" in headlines, labels, or body copy.

Don't ship a cluttered, generic-print-shop layout (dense grids, no breathing room, stock photography) — this is the explicit anti-reference from PRODUCT.md and the opposite of the premium positioning.
Don't use sharp/square corners on cards or buttons — everything in this system rounds at minimum 0.5rem, and primary actions are always full pills.
